name: watchmybirds-telemetry-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that receives anonymous opt-in usage heartbeats from WatchMyBirds installations.

scripts.db:dau: wrangler d1 execute watchmybirds-heartbeats --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT installation_id) AS dau FROM heartbeats WHERE date >= date('now', '-1 day')"
scripts.db:wau: wrangler d1 execute watchmybirds-heartbeats --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT installation_id) AS wau FROM heartbeats WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days')"
scripts.db:mau: wrangler d1 execute watchmybirds-heartbeats --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT installation_id) AS mau FROM heartbeats WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')"
